channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: JD Vance visits Italy for tariff talks and attends Good Friday service at the Vatican
item.description: ROME (AP) — U.S. Vice President JD Vance met with Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni in Rome on Friday for a second day of talks on tariffs and then attended Good Friday services at the Vatican amid speculation of a possible pope greeting this weekend.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Legal group sues Costa Rica alleging the rights of 81 children deported by Trump were violated
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — A group of human rights lawyers is suing Costa Rica, alleging the Central American nation violated the rights of dozens of migrant children by detaining them in a rural camp for nearly two months after they were deported from the U.S. in February.
item.dc:creator: MEGAN JANETSKY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Crews restore power to nearly all customers after island-wide blackout hit Puerto Rico
item.description: Following an island-wide blackout that hit Puerto Rico earlier in the week after a transmission line failed, power was restored on Friday to more than 98% of customers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russia-Ukraine talks reach pivotal moment for Trump
item.description: U.S. efforts to mediate peace talks between Russia and Ukraine are reaching a pivotal moment, with President Trump saying both sides need to quickly show progress or his administration will exit the negotiations. Trump, in remarks from the White House, didn't lay out a specific timeline for a U.S.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, The Hill

item.title: Trump says US will 'take a pass' on Ukraine peace efforts if Russia refuses to play ball
item.description: The Trump administration made clear it will abandon peace attempts for Ukraine if Russia fails to adhere to any terms, but the president did not say whether there would be consequences.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says Ukraine-Russia talks 'coming to a head' and 'no one is playing' him in push to end war
item.description: PARIS (AP) — President Donald Trump on Friday said negotiations between Ukraine and Russia are “coming to a head” and insisted that neither side is “playing” him in his push to end the grinding war. Trump spoke shortly after Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ANGELA CHARLTON and HANNA ARHIROVA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Partisan divide widening on US support for NATO: Pew
item.description: A partisan divide is widening among Americans on the country's support for NATO, with Democrats being more likely to have a positive opinion of the military alliance than Republicans, according to a Thursday survey. The Pew Research Center poll found 66 percent of respondents think the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Iran seeks Russia's support for its nuclear talks with US
item.description: TEHRAN, Iran (AP) — Iran on Friday sought support from Russia over a possible deal with Washington over Tehran’s rapidly advancing nuclear program, ahead of a second round of talks this weekend in Rome.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Huckabee vows 'unwavering' support for Israel in first visit as ambassador
item.description: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee lauded Israel during his first official visit to the country, while offering prayers for peace.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Chinese firm aiding Houthi attacks on US vessels, as airstrikes kill 74
item.description: The State Department is accusing a Chinese satellite firm of providing imagery to support Houthi rebel attacks in the Red Sea, escalating tensions amid ongoing maritime security concerns in the region.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Three tourists among 4 killed after Italian cable car crashes to the ground near Naples
item.description: Three tourist are among the four dead after a cable car crash in Italy. Local prosecutors have opened an investigation into possible manslaughter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Worshippers return to restored Notre Dame for Easter rituals with emotion and awe
item.description: Four months after its reopening, Notre Dame Cathedral hosted an emotional Easter ceremony Friday centered on the Crown of Thorns relic.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nouvian, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: China’s leader ends Southeast Asia tour touting Beijing's reliability vs. US tariff threats
item.description: PHNOM PENH, Cambodia (AP) — Chinese President Xi Jinping capped a three-nation Southeast Asia tour in Cambodia on Friday, promoting Beijing's reliability as the region faces economic uncertainty due to U.S. President Donald Trump’s tariff proposals.
item.dc:creator: SOPHENG CHEANG and GRANT PECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US lawmakers' bipartisan Taiwan visit signals support despite harsh words and tariffs from Trump
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — Republican and Democratic lawmakers made their first trip to Taiwan under the new Trump administration a bipartisan one, aiming to show both Taiwan and China that U.S.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER BODEEN, ELLEN KNICKMEYER and SIMINA MISTREANU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Salvadoran president mocks Van Hollen, Abrego Garcia meeting
item.description: Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele took to social media late Thursday to mock Sen. Chris Van Hollen’s (D-Md.) meeting with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, who was mistakenly deported by the Trump administration last month due to an "administrative error.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Crews restore power to nearly all customers after island-wide blackout hit Puerto Rico
item.description: Officials in Puerto Rico say power has been restored to more than 98% of customers after an island-wide blackout hit the U.S. territory earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Venice expands day-tripper tax in bid to combat overtourism
item.description: Venice has started charging day-trippers to the famed canal city an arrivals tax for the second year, in a measure aimed at combating the kind of overtourism that put the city’s UNESCO World Cultural Heritage status at risk.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Barry, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 25 in Gaza and Huckabee makes first appearance as US ambassador
item.description: Israeli airstrikes across Gaza have killed at least 25 people including children as the new U.S. ambassador to Israel made his first public appearance in Jerusalem.
item.dc:creator: Wafaa Shurafa And Fatma Khaled, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US man hijacks small plane in Belize, stabs 3 people before he's shot dead
item.description: Authorities at the Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport reported a hijacking of a small plan by a U.S. man who stabbed two passengers and a pilot before being fatally shot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Protest letters from former Israeli soldiers lay bare profound rifts over the ongoing war
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — When nearly 1,000 Israeli Air Force veterans signed an open letter last week calling for an end to the war in Gaza, the military responded immediately, saying it would dismiss any active reservist who signed the document.
item.dc:creator: MELANIE LIDMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US pastor abducted at gunpoint while preaching in South Africa
item.description: Four men stole two cellphones from members of the congregation and kidnapped the pastor in his own truck.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Trump floats deporting 'homegrown criminals' to El Salvador
item.description: Trump has suggested shipping off U.S. citizens who commit violent crimes to places like El Salvador's notorious mega-prison CECOT.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Putin sees Trump as 'an easy mark': John Bolton
item.description: During Monday's meeting with the press, Trump said of Ukraine: "When you start a war, you've gotta know that you can win the war.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hosts El Salvador's Nayib Bukele amid deportation controversy
item.description: Since March, El Salvador has accepted more than 200 Venezuelan immigrants accused by the U.S. of gang activity and violent crimes.
item.dc:creator: Tom Dempsey, NewsNation

item.title: Trump trade war with China hurting US farmers, advocate says
item.description: John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation family farmer who works 1,300 acres in Virginia, said he hopes the Trump administration will listen to farmers moving forward.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Daughter of German-American dissident whose body was mutilated by Iran calls on Trump to nix nuke talks
item.description: The daughter of a California man, Jamshid "Jimmy" Sharmahd, who was executed and mutilated by Iran, wants the U.S. to break off nuclear talks with the clerical regime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tragic NYC helicopter crash hits home in Barcelona, where victims were well known
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — As they sat inside a helicopter shortly before a flight over the towering skyscrapers of New York City, Agustin Escobar flashed a thumbs-up while his wife and children beamed big smiles.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Israel cuts off Gaza's southern city of Rafah and vows to 'vigorously' expand in the territory
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — Israel announced Saturday it had completed construction of a new security corridor cutting off the southern city of Rafah from the rest of Gaza, and the military said it would soon expand “vigorously” in most of the small coastal territory.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, WGN 9
